your customer support said i could come replace my xfi pod in store i drove 55 minutes to get to the closest store and the first guy i spoke to with the painted nails was just very rude to me and told me that it's impossible to get it replaced today when i explained i was upset having been told i could and then driving 55 minutes to get here he said you will need to get one mailed to you by the end of the week or next week no compensation for the inconvenience that came with the mix up between your online support and in-store staff i'm a loyal member have been for a long time but that really annoyed me with the service provided

first off, i was very disappointed with the service i received. on top of my discontent, i stood next to other complaining customers. my biggest disappointment with xfinity is the cell phone service i was duped into signing up for. it was pitched to me as free cell service for one year. when i went to the store to get assistance with a activation, i was told the free service was not as good as another service that's cost me money monthly😡who does that..offer 2 cell services within the same company? i know of no one else that does that and if i discover anyone else that does it, i'm staying away.
i've been with xfinity for years and i've never had any problems; they've always resolved issues without a hitch. very, very reliable.
